codeReview.summary: The reviewed worker inspected the transcript skeleton and existing seed assets, but the feature was not actually delivered for M2: the handoff cites an unrelated M2-F2 test commit and claims the requested bootstrap already existed, while the only tracked bootstrap artifacts are M6/M7-specific docs/scripts that do not provide an M2-scoped documented setup for reviewer task-select, empty-task clearing, and embed restore validation. This leaves the milestone without the requested M2 validation bootstrap evidence in repo artifacts workers/validators are expected to read.

issues.description: The seeded bootstrap is explicitly for M6+M7 demo scenarios, not the assigned M2 restore-validation feature. Its inventory and docs are named and scoped around M6/M7 collaboration fixtures, so treating it as the completed M2 bootstrap does not satisfy the feature description or expected behavior.

The only documented seed/setup path referenced by the worker is an M6+M7 demo pack. There is no M2-specific documented bootstrap artifact under the M2 validation area or other mission-read artifacts showing how to produce the three required M2 restore scenarios for user-testing.

The handoff records commitId `5cf75d790d8dc7af6a87ea74242d4a0d7c74581b`, but that commit is `test(review): cover snapshot restore paths` and changes only M2-F2 test files. There is no feature diff for M2-F3 itself, so the required bootstrap implementation is missing validation-backed code/documentation changes for this feature.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `review-demo-seed-worker` skill still points workers at ignored `scripts/` paths and an M6+M7 mission framing, which does not match the tracked `debug_scripts/` location the worker relied on here.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/review-demo-seed-worker/SKILL.md:1 and lines 55-80 reference M6+M7 and `scripts/review_demo_seed.py`, while tracked artifacts live at `debug_scripts/review_demo_seed.py` and `debug_scripts/review_demo_seed_test.py`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission-shared knowledge currently documents only the M6 seed discoverability hardening, not an M2 restore bootstrap location, so later validators/readers have no canonical M2 artifact to consult.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/m6-seed-discoverability.md:1-5 documents only M6/M7 seed discoverability; searching `.factory/validation/M2-restore-unification` found no M2 seed/bootstrap references.

summary: Review failed: the worker reviewed transcript/diff evidence, but the cited implementation is an existing M6/M7 seed pack plus an unrelated M2-F2 test commit, not a delivered M2 restore-validation bootstrap. No M2-scoped bootstrap artifact or feature diff was found in repo validation/shared-state locations.
